params.name: Fortune Cat Mainspring
params.description: Because its owner would break it open once a week, Fortune Cat felt indignant and took refuge with the Demon Gods, who trained it to be a killer. Unfortunately, this cute cat was not good at fighting. Soon after the fight with the snail, it was beaten back to its original form and turned into a Relic!
params.ss1: In Snail Store, Fortune Cat B-tad cap +20000
